record.bridgyOriginalText:
Stop using AI just for simple stuff. If you feed it basic prompts, you'll get basic answers. The real trick is pushing it to think harder for you.

Here's a solid way to work.

Tell it what lens to look through first. Something like SWOT or Porter's Force. That frames everything before you even ask the main question. Then push it to explore "what if" situations rather than settle for a summary of a topic. (1/3)
